notes.body: Delivery deactivated for 2065 INDEFINITELY (ticket 706314) after we reported intermittent internet and drivers arriving for orders we never received. ACTION: deactivate the store on FIVEGUYS.COM (OLO) and file a hub ticket on the internet. Do not request re-activation until the internet is stable for a full day.
Tasks stacked: L-Rev open 7/16, 7/17, 7/18, 7/19; VO-Rec BOSS Alpha 7/17 + 7/18; VO-Rec Performance Fdsvce x2 7/17; Inv-Final for Post 7/19; Post Period — Labor Not Posted 7/19. Close all today.
Shopper scores: Let's get our shoppers to #1 — we're at the bottom this week. Drive, Coach, & Celebrate our Halo Effect! July store average is 57.3% across 3 shops; the 7/11 Dinner zero drives it.
SCAM ALERT: Scammers calling stores as "Uber" with connectivity issues asking for email+login. NO ONE gives login info over the phone. Post this by the phone.

Manager Certifications 2065 COMPLETE — Rusul 100, Anthony 99, Madelynn 98; training videos fixed. Standing: 60% of the KPI score is Shops + Complaints + Ticket times. Any outside vendor call still requires a hub ticket.
OPEN: Is Ryan Vititoe still employed with us? Reply yes/no so payroll can close it out.
OPEN: 7/17 deposit not yet entered — book cash $433.90 showing as O/S short. Enter the deposit in CrunchTime.
Sunday 7/19: Closing Checklist MISSED and PM Pre-Shift Check MISSED — both on Madison Cureton's PM shift. AM (Vicki Lucey) clean. Second PM flag in two weeks.
